description: Standard manufacturer-recommended maintenance item.
notes_for_user: Usually required at regular mileage or time intervals.

description: Usually performed together with an engine oil change.
notes_for_user: Often bundled with oil service.

description: Standard maintenance item to promote even tire wear.
notes_for_user: Usually recommended at regular intervals.

description: Usually needed only if the vehicle pulls, steering is off-center, or tires show uneven wear.
notes_for_user: Ask whether there are symptoms or tire wear findings.

description: Usually needed when there is vibration or during tire installation/replacement.
notes_for_user: Typically symptom-based unless included with tire service.

description: Manufacturer maintenance item affecting cabin airflow and HVAC performance.
notes_for_user: Often replaced at regular mileage intervals.

description: Manufacturer maintenance item affecting engine intake airflow.
notes_for_user: Check actual interval by vehicle and region.

description: Manufacturer maintenance item with longer replacement intervals.
notes_for_user: Interval varies by engine.

description: Legitimate inspection item commonly part of standard maintenance.
notes_for_user: Inspection itself is usually reasonable.

description: Needed based on actual brake pad wear, not just time.
notes_for_user: Ask for pad thickness measurement.

description: Needed based on rotor thickness, wear, scoring, or damage.
notes_for_user: Ask whether rotors are below spec or damaged.

description: Can be a legitimate service depending on age, moisture content, or maintenance interval.
notes_for_user: Check vehicle age, maintenance history, or test result.

description: May be reasonable in harsh climates or during brake service, but not always a standard scheduled item.
notes_for_user: More relevant in salt/winter climates such as Ontario.

description: Valid service if terminal corrosion is present.
notes_for_user: Usually minor service; ask if corrosion was observed.

description: Legitimate when battery health test shows failure or weak performance.
notes_for_user: Ask for battery test result and CCA reading.

description: Manufacturer maintenance item with long intervals.
notes_for_user: Check first interval and repeat interval by model.

description: Legitimate in some cases depending on maintenance policy, mileage, usage, and transmission type.
notes_for_user: Should be vehicle-aware and not treated as always required.

description: May be needed based on drivetrain and service conditions.
notes_for_user: Relevant only for certain drivetrains.

description: May be needed depending on drivetrain and use case.
notes_for_user: Relevant only on vehicles equipped with transfer case.

description: Usually symptom-based and should not be sold routinely without diagnosis.
notes_for_user: Ask whether cooling performance is poor and whether leaks were checked.

description: Typically not part of standard manufacturer maintenance and often sold as an optional service.
notes_for_user: Usually only justified if there are drivability symptoms.

description: Typically not part of standard scheduled maintenance.
notes_for_user: Usually only needed if there are symptoms such as rough idle.

description: Usually an optional upsell rather than a standard maintenance item.
notes_for_user: Ask for specific symptoms and manufacturer guidance.

description: Usually marketed as an optional cleaning service, not routine maintenance.
notes_for_user: Ask what problem this service is intended to solve.

description: Usually optional and not a standard scheduled service.
notes_for_user: Often overlaps conceptually with injector cleaning.

description: Usually an upsell item, not standard maintenance.
notes_for_user: Often not necessary if correct oil is already used.

description: Usually optional and not part of standard scheduled maintenance.
notes_for_user: Ask why it is needed now.

description: A general inspection item, often free or bundled.
notes_for_user: Useful if it supports other findings.

description: A check for open campaigns or service actions.
notes_for_user: Informational only.

description: A check for open recalls.
notes_for_user: Informational only.

description: A minor tire-system setup/reset item, often bundled.
notes_for_user: Usually part of tire service workflow.

description: Minor consumable top-up item.
notes_for_user: Usually low-value add-on or bundled item.

description: Legitimate when a fault, warning light, or symptom exists.
notes_for_user: Ask what symptom or code triggered the diagnosis.
